title: Object Detection Path
description: Build fluency in Object Detection inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) Extensions

Start after FPN (Feature Pyramid Network) and Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN). It opens into Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) Extensions Extensions Techniques and Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) Extensions Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
